description:
A GitHub Desktop fork with advanced functionality and Bitbucket, GitLab integration.

An up-to-date fork of GitHub Desktop with additional features including multiple account support, Bitbucket and GitLab integration, commit search, multiple stashes per branch, and more.
Changes and improvements:
- [#204] Renamed the icon files to gh-desktop-plus to sidestep a KDE bug that caused the app to display the wrong taskbar icon.
Fixes:
- The APT and RPM packages now use the correct version number internally, instead of the upstream version number.
